title: rubus pungens var. horridulus
intro: Rubus pungens var. horridulus, also known as Japanese bramble or thorny raspberry, is a thorny shrub native to Japan and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and flavonoids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus pungens var. horridulus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall well-being and immune function.
